review_title: Simple and clean VPN

review_title: You have to have a VPN nowadays and Pure VPN is a solid choice
description: Very clear and easy process, it randomizes your ip address and stay safe online.
author: tenae K.
pros: I like the feeling of security while staying anonymous online. I am also less worried about cyber attacks because it randomizes your ip every time if youd like.
cons: Id like to be able to review the logging details.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Another app with great promises and almost 0 delivery
description: For the first several months I was a happy user until the day I had to contact the support for an issue restricting me to use the service.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I give them the credit that the desktop app is made to look shiny and modern. On first sight it look like you have plentiful of options to choose different servers and locations. Overall it has a good touch to detail.
cons: There are a few things that I really did not like about this software. First of all sometimes I need to connect to a different server on the same location and obtain different IP for testing purposes, but this feature is not present unfortunately. While everything is working and you don't need to contact the support everything is fine, but if you do, don't expect fast answer and resolution of your issue. I've had to send multiple tickets for the same issue, followed the instructions that the support agent gave me with no result. Just to get on live chat so the other agent can ask me to do the same thing over again. After I explained to him that I've already made all those steps, he instructed me to do another thing, which is great, but in the middle of the conversation he just cut the chat saying that they will contact me over email. I guess it's just that his shift was over and he wouldn't bother to explain.

review_title: An excellent VPN with some drawbacks
description: Overall the VPN allows us to meet our end goal as we do business in both the UK and Germany and sometimes it is necessary to appear to be from one location when in another.
author: Thomas B.
pros: PureVPN is easy to install and maintain across both desktop and mobile with apps available for a number of devices. With the app installed then it is an easy one click to connect securely to the VPN. You can also chose a location or accept the best connection. This means you have ease of use coupled with a choice of more complex settings such as a dedicated IP. Unlike other VPNs we tried there is a lot less of not being able to access sites or cloud flare popups.
cons: The basic VPN function works fine, however I have not been able to get the dedicated IP to function properly and just keep getting an error when trying to connect to it. However the level of English from support made it difficult to troubleshot so now I do not use this feature.

review_title: Good VPN service
author: Oleg G.
pros: A lot of locations. High speed. Good ping. App for android and windows.
cons: Lack of thor connection for higher security and anonymous like ProtonVPN have.

review_title: Value for money but quality could have been better
description: I'm a marketer and I use this tool to see local search results from a variety of places in the world. So lack of servers around the world bugs me. If you are one who don't want to experience the web from around world you wouldn't have much problem.
author: Upendra R.
pros: The Pricing for which I got the product was a decision maker for me. Plus I like how I can use Google Chrome extension in one chrome user account and browse the normal internet in another chrome user or you can access internet from any part of world in Mozilla using extension and browse normal local web in chrome.
cons: Less number of servers and unavailability of servers in coutries like Russia, China, various gulf countries. Also the speed of browsing is not that good.

review_title: I'm on the VPN fence about this VPN
description: Overall it's worked for me, but I don't know too much about them as mentioned. I want to know more about their data trafficking, user data retention and general user information sharing. Therefore, I'm still on the fence about PureVPN.
author: Ryan L.
pros: This VPN is quite simple to setup. They have a very easy to use UI, makes other VPN's seem more difficult to use. It works well, connects quickly, masks your IP and keeps you feeling more secure.
cons: I don't really know them. I've had mixed reactions from their support team. They're helpful, and at times unresponsive, then at times they're very responsive, so there's definite levels of inconsistency I'm not too happy about.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Low cost, not user friendly
description: Wouldn't pay money for it again, there are better options for similar price that work a lot better
author: Clint M.
pros: The cost of it was very low compared to other similar VPNS
cons: The functionality was very lacking, VPN disconnects often and slows your connection significantly

review_title: Bypass geo-blocking and stay anonymous.
description: I have used PureVPN for two things, the first of them is to protect my browsing data, especially when browsing on pages full of pop-ups or downloads, in order to protect my data. The second reason to use purevpn is because sometimes I want to access some pages of interest but they have geoblocking activated and they don't let me enter from my place of origin, so with purevpn you can enter the pages and get the documents and information I'm looking for.
author: cristian B.
pros: It is easy to use, very intuitive, you can use it on your mobile or laptop without any problem, the connection in general is quite fast and you can effectively bypass region locks and protect your browsing data.
cons: Sometimes some connections can be a little slow or unstable, but nothing that cannot be solved by changing the country.

review_title: PureVPN - No more boundaries for your Internet
description: I’ve been using PureVPN for over a year now, throughout this time period, my overall experience with PureVPN is very satisfactory. I will recommend PureVPN to anyone without any hesitations.
author: Shalitha M.
pros: PureVPN is one of the best and most affordable VPN available in the market right now. I'll explain best things I love about PureVPN briefly. 1. Ease of use/Fast – PureVPN has one of the easiest to use interfaces and PureVPN offers great speeds so that users will not experience any difficulties in Streaming & Downloads. 2. No of servers - PureVPN has hundreds of server locations scattered around the world accessible for everyone whenever you need. You can find servers in almost every country you like. 3. Various streaming Servers are provided separately- if you go to the streaming section of the PureVPN app you can find various streaming servers you can connect to. This includes US Netflix, HULU and all major streaming services. UK Netflix is also available, but provided only through browser Extensions. 4. Easy to use browser Extensions – PureVPN currently has browser extensions available for Chrome and Firefox, and they have advertised opera extension is also coming soon on their member area for users. 5. Obfuscated Security Bypass – This is one of the best features I love about PureVPN, you can bypass services like FortiGuard without any effort using PureVPN within seconds. Never Seen any other VPN bypass FortiGuard that Quickly. 6. Options available for Advance users – PureVPN provides almost all tunneling protocols available in the world for use in manual configurations with well guided instructions for routers, NAS units etc.
cons: From my personal experience PureVPN works very well all the time. Sometimes users might experience difficulties in streaming US Netflix by directly connecting to a United State server, in that case users should select US Netflix service from streaming section, and it will work properly.

review_title: Good VPN with dedicated IP option
author: Andy P.
pros: I like the way that you have the option to add a dedicated ip (so that you always have the same ip address) as it can help reduce problems when using VPNs with social networks.
cons: I didnt find it as reliable as other vpns like Tunnelbear and Nord VPN.

review_title: Handy VPN tool with multiple country options
description: Great VPN for security and web management purposes. Have had no real issues with it.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I've used this VPN for years. It's a great tool that's useful for not only security purposes but also for times that I need to review websites from other countries for work and geo-restrictions present issues. It also has many countries to choose from.
cons: It can sometimes be a little buggy when it is being updated. This generally doesn't happen, but can do on occasion.

review_title: Software which is very functional and quick to get into
description: Am working on a application that has different behaviours in different countries, in order to test the app from different locations am using PureVPN to connect.
author: Dennis N.
pros: I like the most the simplistic UI and the small window that is used for the application, all the information you need is organised and easy to find. Works quick with high reliability.
cons: I didn't like that on MacOS when you try to disconnect from a connection from the status bar the window gets bugged out and keeps moving to the right, nothing is happening and only left option is to open the application and disconnect from there.

review_title: PureVPN was just the solution I was looking for
description: Overall, PureVPN was an extremely affordable and viable solution to access virtual private networks.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I loved that fact that PureVPN introduced software to easily access all their features without having to manually change TCP/IP settings, etc. It made something ordinarily intimidating much more accessible.
cons: Connectivity speeds were often slow, and certain cities and countries weren't always working

review_title: Simple and Fast VPN
description: Easy to use VPN for all devices.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like how PureVPN supports several VPN protocols, including: IKEv2, L2TP, PPTP, OpenVPN, and SSTP.
cons: It can be difficult to get online sometimes.

review_title: Honestly it's an average OK experience
description: Good protection and privacy from the internet
author: Brian K.
pros: It's a cheap and affordable solution. Install, logon to the appropriate location, and I am well-protected from prying "eyes" of the internet. It has a number of locations which I can logon remotely, and I can configure it to auto-login upon computer startup.
cons: But...it can be slow in connecting to international servers. Sometimes, it takes a while to locate the nearest and right servers remotely. Worse thing is that I found out that it causes conflicts with my local internet connection. (for my case, not sure if this is a common issue for other users) I had to troubleshoot and ultimately I discovered that PureVPN is the culprit. It also can cause conflicts with chrome extensions when enabling PureVPN extension in Chrome browsers. Hence, I had to disable it in order to get things working properly again. What a letdown sometimes!

review_title: Best prices for VPN but not the best security
author: Pierre M.
pros: It was easy to use with lots of connections
cons: DNS leaks are too common and the kill switch doesn't work

review_title: Purevpn review
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: surf some restricted websites anonymously
cons: I didnt have access to all websites which isnt supposed to be so

review_title: Fast and Functional VPN Service for the Price
description: Seamless security, anonymity and privacy!

pros: I like how fast and reliable this VPN service is! The settings are great, the configuration is straightforward and the functionality is seamless.
cons: I have no complaints. This is the first VPN service I've used that's worked as advertised and intended without any hiccups.

cons: Although a little slow at times to respond, the customer service was good. Smartphone apps are a little iffy.

review_title: PureVPN - standard VPN almost free to try
description: I used it to connect to my workplace and it was outstanding in its speed, but it is pricy and I rather using company solution which is free for me now.
author: Michal R.
pros: I loved the free to try price where you paid only a bit to try for limited timespan. And also there were almost no delays while working.
cons: The pricing should be lowered a bit, and also PureVPN could add some features to rise from other equally comparable services.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: setup
description: I was impressed with customer support to get me through the initial hurdles of the unexpected turns one always encounters with setup. The customer service reps were very quick with the connections and were knowledgeable and patient to explain even the seemingly dumbest question they may have heard that day. A great way to impress and win over new customers!
author: Gabor N.

review_title: My PureVPN experience
description: The free option is not so useful for me, as I wan not able to connect to free servers, so I chose another App for iOS.
author: Mikhail K.
pros: User-friendly interface, different protocol options, on-demand connect.
cons: Almost all servers are available only for premium account.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best VPN EVER!!!
description: Everytime I have a problem, they can fix it, they are so knowledgeable and friendly. They are my first VPN service and hopefully my last. :)
author: Gabriel G.
